title: OPT (Optional Practical Training)
description: Post-graduation work authorization for F-1 students.

timeline.description: Earliest you can apply for OPT
Latest you can apply for OPT

checklist: Complete Form I-765 (Application for Employment Authorization)
Gather required documents (passport, I-20, I-94, photos)
Mail application to USCIS or file online
Report employment to DSO within 10 days of start
requirements: Valid F-1 status for at least one full academic year
Employment must be directly related to major field of study
Must apply within the 90-day pre-completion or 60-day post-completion window
Cannot exceed 90 days of unemployment during 12-month OPT period
